name: Coventry, Harlequin, Holiday, Fruit & Nut Cheese Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (4 ounces) shredded sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the cream and cheddar cheeses.
2. Add onion, parsley, Lea & Perrins, and salt; blend well.
3. Shape into a ball. Chill and serve with assorted crackers, if desired.
Variations:
- HARLEQUIN CHEESE BALL: Add 2 tablespoons finely diced pimiento, 1 teaspoon prepared brown mustard, and 1 clove garlic, crushed to the basic cheese mixture. Shape into a ball. Garnish with pimiento stars, if desired.
- HOLIDAY CHEESE BALL: Add 1 tablespoon caraway to the basic cheese mixture. Shape into a ball. Chill. Sprinkle ribbons of paprika and chopped parsley around the ball.
- FRUIT AND NUT CHEESE BALL: Add 1 can (8 1/4 ounces) crushed pineapple, well drained, and 1/3 cup finely chopped nuts to the basic cheese mixture. Shape into a ball; roll in 1/3 cup finely chopped nuts. Chill.
